fetch_method: curl chapter HTML (full chapter text) + local tag-strip extraction; also archived chapter PDF
notes: Portal consultation URL retains the 'draft' slug but serves the adopted chapter text. The system/files Chapter 14 PDF is an Illustrator/image-based layout (not text-extractable); standards were extracted from the HTML chapter page which contains the full text including Table 14.19 car parking, Table 14.16 bicycle, DMSO objectives. Bicycle per-use ratios sit in Table 14.16 (referenced). Density and plot ratio are policy-led, not fixed numeric thresholds in this chapter.
